evidence.quote: The electrochemical exfoliation was performed in an aqueous solution of ammonium sulfate at 3v potential for 3h duration using CHI660E workstation.

These compositions were synthesized using Fritsch Pulverisette 7, Premium Line planetary ball mill. The ball milling was performed for 20h using tungsten carbide balls... in MBraun UNIlab Plus glove box under argon atmosphere.
rGO and Ni (25 μm, 99% pure) quantities were 10 wt % and 3 atomic wt %, respectively, and the remaining fraction was Mg 44μm,>99% pure).
(Shriniwasan et al. 2018)

The (de)hydrogenation experiments were performed using Sievert type apparatus. Hydrogenation was carried out at ~15 bar hydrogen pressure and ~320 °C. The reaction was aborted after saturation when no further hydrogen was absorbed.
Upon hydrogenation (Hyd), most of the Mg is converted to MgH2
